name: cf613x306
drl:
rule TJ0 when $a : E0() $b : E0(this before[0ms,100ms] $a) then end
rule TJ1 when $a : E0() $b : E0(this before[0ms,100ms] $a) then end
rule W2 salience -5 when accumulate( E0(tag == "y", $t : ts) over window:time(150ms); $c : sum($t) ) then end
rule J3 when $e : E0($t : tag) then insertLogical(new D($t)); end
rule RD4 salience 3 when D() then end
rule ND5 salience -2 when not D() P() then end
rule G6 salience 15 when P(v == 2) then insert(new P3(3)); end
rule C7 salience 3 when P3() then end
rule NE8 when not E0() P() then end
_finding: GRADUATED (D-156): shared temporal SELF-join arrival batch — the self-pair belongs to the RIGHT-role phase (Drools propagates the left insert before the self-right exists); the engine's flush_ins_delta rights-first loop had it heading the left-role batch. Fixed by the D-156 membership move, scoped to the shared divert.
